channel.title: Illustration on RaihnForge
channel.description: Recent content in Illustration on RaihnForge

item.title: Honey Badger Decal Wallpaper
item.description:
The honey badger is a fitting mascot for a “Never Quit!” motto — the animal is famously relentless. This design started as a decal concept and expanded into a desktop wallpaper because the composition held up at larger sizes.

Original character, original design. No references beyond the animal itself and a strong sense of what the motto should feel like visually.

The wallpaper is available to download — click the title and right-click to save the full-size PNG.

item.title: Ghost Reign — StarCraft Remastered Portrait Contest
item.description:
When Blizzard opened submissions for the StarCraft Remastered portrait contest, I knew I had to enter. StarCraft has been a constant presence in my creative life — through the esports communities I’ve worked with, the fan art I’ve made, and the friendships the game has facilitated.

Ghost Reign features the Ghost unit rendered in a painterly style intended to complement the remastered visual direction. The Ghost is a compelling subject — silent, precise, operating in the space between human and weapon.
